inputs.text: Main bahut tezi se bukhaar mahsoos kar rahi hoon, sir dard bhi bahut hai

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya

hypotheses.label: Viral fever

hypotheses.label: Dengue

inputs.text: Aankhon ke peeche dard ho raha hai, haddiyan toot rahi hain, bukhaar abhi bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Retro-orbital pain and bone pain are characteristic of Chikungunya

hypotheses.label: Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever symptoms can overlap with these

inputs.text: Bukhaar kam ho gayi hai, lal daane nikal aaye hain, masoodon se khoon aa raha hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Fever drop, rash appearance, and bleeding gums are cardinal signs of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever can have a rash but other symptoms don't fit as well

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria doesn't typically cause a rash or bleeding gums

inputs.text: Main bahut kamzor mehsoos kar rahi hoon, pet dard bhi ho raha hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Extreme weakness and abdominal symptoms can be seen in Dengue hemorrhagic fever
